hero.title: Turnkey renovation without stress
hero.subtitle: Apartment & house renovations | Warsaw
hero.description: We take care of the entire renovation process: coordination, contractors and materials. You get a beautiful interior without chaos or stress.

turnkey.name: Turnkey renovation
turnkey.desc: Full project management A to Z

step1.title: Consultation
step1.desc: We learn your needs and discuss the project vision.

step2.title: Quote
step2.desc: We provide a transparent quote with no hidden costs.

step3.title: Execution
step3.desc: We carry out work according to the agreed schedule.

step4.title: Handover
step4.desc: We carefully inspect and hand over the finished interior.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How long does an apartment renovation take?
faq.a1: It depends on the scope. A standard 50m² renovation takes 4–6 weeks.
faq.q2: Do you help with material selection?
faq.a2: Yes, we offer advice on finishing materials.
faq.a3: We work with interior designers and can arrange a project.
faq.a4: Payment in stages according to the work schedule.
faq.a5: Yes, we provide a 12-month warranty on all completed work.

contact.title: Ready for a change?
contact.subtitle: Call and schedule a free consultation.
contact.form_success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Turnkey apartment and house renovations. Professional, on time, stress-free.
footer.area_text: Warsaw and surrounding areas: Mokotów, Wilanów, Ursynów, Wola, Bemowo and more.
